result.stdout:
gop:
  A CLI tool to generate Online-Judge Problem. Powered by StardustDL. Source codes at https://github.com/StardustDL/generator-oj-problem .

Usage:
  gop [options] [command]

Options:
  --version    Display version information

Commands:
  init       Initialize the problem. The current directory must be empty.
  pack       Pack the problem into one package to submit.
  check      Check whether the problem is available to pack.
  preview    Preview the problem.
  gen        Generate data.

commands.payload:
gop:
  A CLI tool to generate Online-Judge Problem. Powered by StardustDL. Source codes at https://github.com/StardustDL/generator-oj-problem .

Usage:
  gop [options] [command]

Options:
  --version    Display version information

Commands:
  init       Initialize the problem. The current directory must be empty.
  pack       Pack the problem into one package to submit.
  check      Check whether the problem is available to pack.
  preview    Preview the problem.
  gen        Generate data.

result.stdout:
check:
  Check whether the problem is available to pack.

Usage:
  gop check [options]

Options:
  --disable-local-judger <DISABLE-LOCAL-JUDGER>    Disable local judging for check.
  -p, --platform <PLATFORM>                        The target platform: generic, hustoj, fps, localjudge.

result.stdout:
gen:
  Generate data.

Usage:
  gop gen [options]

Options:
  -o, --output <O>    Generate output data for samples and tests.

result.stdout:
pack:
  Pack the problem into one package to submit.

Usage:
  gop pack [options]

Options:
  --force <FORCE>                                  Pack although checking failing.
  --disable-local-judger <DISABLE-LOCAL-JUDGER>    Disable local judging for check.
  -p, --platform <PLATFORM>                        The target platform: generic, hustoj, fps, localjudge.
